title: melissa maritima
intro: Melissa maritima, also known as sweet lemon balm or sea lavender, is a perennial plant native to Europe, particularly in coastal areas, and is a member of the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Melissa maritima include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and fighting off infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Melissa maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for use in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, salves, and potpourri.
